message:
refactor: Delete JS SQL layer, route all SQL to WASM

Remove ~7000 lines of duplicate JS SQL implementation:
- Delete src/client/sql/ (lexer, parser, executor, planner)
- Delete orphaned database files (lance-database, lance-db-*)
- Replace JS SQL parser with 3 regex patterns for time travel
- All SQL execution now routes to WASM via executeWasmSqlFull

Bundle size reduction:
- Worker: 193KB → 50KB (74% smaller)
- Client: 193KB → 97KB (50% smaller)

Tests: 91 passed, 10 failed (pre-existing GPU issues)
